lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Flavors and Traditions -- The Past Simple of Irregular Verbs
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carolina Paludetto Rodrigues | Aula 8 -- Flavors and Traditions

listenings.text: Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the Flavors of Brazil food festival. Last year more than two thousand people came to our event, and this year we made it even bigger. Our cooks prepared traditional dishes from every region of the country. Yesterday our chefs made fresh cheese bread, and many visitors ate it with a smile. People drank fresh juice and tried our famous spicy stew. At the dessert tent, a local family gave out their grandmother recipe for free. Every dish here tells a story and keeps a tradition alive. So walk around, taste a new flavor, and find your favorite meal. Thank you for coming, and enjoy the festival.

Hi, this is Carolina. You asked about my favorite dish, so here is a short note. Last Sunday my whole family had lunch together at my grandmother house. She made her famous chicken with rice, and it was delicious. The flavor was perfect, not too spicy. I ate two full plates. After lunch my mother gave me the recipe, so now I can cook it too. For dessert we had a sweet pudding, and my brother drank three glasses of juice. We talked and laughed for hours. A good meal is a beautiful family tradition. I went home happy and full. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Last Sunday Carolina went to her grandmother house for lunch. Her grandmother made a delicious dish. Carolina ate two plates of food. After the meal they had a sweet dessert. Finally her mother gave her the recipe.
